info.name: Zealthix API Integration
info.description: Hospital OS - Zealthix API Integration Endpoints

request.description:
Search for patients by ID, mobile number, IP number, ABHA number, or visit type.

**Use Cases:**
- Find patient before creating pre-auth
- Search by mobile number when patient ID unknown
- Get current active visits for a patient

**Search Options (use at least one):**
- `patientId`: Patient UHID (e.g., AVN-20250101-0001)
- `mobileNumber`: Patient mobile (e.g., 9876543210)
- `ipNumber`: Inpatient admission ID
- `abhaNumber`: Ayushman Bharat Health Account number
- `ipdVisitType`: Filter by OUTPATIENT, INPATIENT, or FINANCIAL_COUNSELLING

Get comprehensive visit details including patient info, treatment details, billing breakdown.

**Use Cases:**
- Get complete visit information for pre-auth
- Retrieve billing details for claim submission
- Get doctor and treatment information

**Request Fields:**
- `visitId`: Required - Visit/Admission ID from patient search
- `visitDateTime`: Optional - Visit date-time in ISO format
- `visitType`: Required - INPATIENT or OUTPATIENT or FINANCIAL_COUNSELLING

**Response Includes:**
- Patient details (name, phone, policy, payer)
- Treatment details (admission/discharge, diagnosis)
- Doctor details (name, department, room type)
- Bill breakdown by category (surgery, pharmacy, lab, etc.)

Retrieve all documents related to a visit as base64-encoded PDFs.

**Use Cases:**
- Download invoices for claim processing
- Get discharge summary for final claim
- Retrieve lab reports and consent forms

**Request Fields:**
- `visitId`: Required - Visit/Admission ID
- `visitDateTime`: Optional - Visit date-time
- `visitType`: Required - INPATIENT or OUTPATIENT

**Response:**
Array of documents, each containing:
- `id`: Document ID
- `title`: Document name
- `contentType`: application/pdf
- `attachmentType`: Bill, DischargeSummary, Investigation, Consent
- `base64`: Base64 encoded PDF content

**Note:** You'll need to decode base64 to get the actual PDF file.

request.description:
Zealthix calls this endpoint to update claim status in Hospital OS.

**Use Cases:**
- Update pre-auth status (initiated, approved, rejected)
- Update enhancement request status
- Update final claim status
- Update settlement details

**Action Status Types:**
- `PREAUTH`: Pre-authorization request
- `ENHANCEMENT`: Enhancement request for additional amount
- `DISCHARGE`: Discharge intimation
- `FINAL`: Final claim settlement

**Status Examples:**
- "Pre Auth Initiated"
- "Pre Auth Approved"
- "Pre Auth Rejected"
- "Claim Submitted"
- "Claim Approved"
- "Claim Settled"

**Amount Fields:**
- `totalAmount`: Total claim amount
- `approvedAmount`: Amount approved by insurance
- `settledAmount`: Final settled amount (after TDS)
- `tdsAmount`: TDS deducted

**Note:** This updates the claim record in Hospital OS. Hospital staff can see the status in their dashboard.
Example: Search patient by mobile number only
